prompt: Generate a screenshot of a receipt for plant purchases from a bonsai nursery. The receipt should include one unit for each of the bonsai trees shown in the first and second images.
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of a digital receipt for plant purchases from a bonsai nursery. The receipt should list two purchased items: one unit of 'Chinese Elm' at $99.00 (as depicted in image 1) and one unit of 'Azalea - Pink Blossom' at $59.00 (as depicted in image 2). The receipt should clearly display the quantity, item name, unit price, and a calculated subtotal and total for these specific items.
objects: Column headers for Quantity, Item Name, and Unit Price
Line item for 'Chinese Elm' with quantity 1 and unit price $99.00
Line item for 'Azalea - Pink Blossom' with quantity 1 and unit price $59.00
